scenarios.title: Semiconductor Liquidity Shock
scenarios.summary: Combines port congestion with an SEC liquidity warning to trigger the full escalation path.

signals.headline: Port congestion delays high-value semiconductor shipments
signals.summary: Major logistics bottlenecks are extending shipment timelines by 10 days.

signals.headline: Supplier disclosed material uncertainty tied to debt covenants
signals.summary: Latest filing highlights liquidity pressure and refinancing risk.

scenarios.title: Weather Disruption Watch
scenarios.summary: Shows a lower-risk case that still produces a report but should avoid human escalation.

signals.headline: Regional storms delay inbound hardware shipments
signals.summary: Temporary weather issues slowed transport capacity for two days.

scenarios.title: Governance Sanitization Case
scenarios.summary: Demonstrates policy review and redaction of sensitive contact data in request content.

scenarios.title: Cross-Border Compliance Alert
scenarios.summary: Shows a regulated cross-border supplier incident that should trigger compliance review before reporting.

signals.headline: Critical supplier SLA breach detected in European processing hub
signals.summary: Internal monitoring flagged repeated delivery misses for regulated workloads.

signals.headline: Single-source dependency remains unresolved
signals.summary: The supplier still owns the only qualified production path for a priority service.

scenarios.title: Retail Inventory Recovery
scenarios.summary: Demonstrates a moderate disruption that should generate mitigation steps without human escalation.

signals.headline: West coast warehouse delays seasonal inventory transfer
signals.summary: A temporary labor slowdown is delaying final-mile distribution by three days.

signals.headline: Backup supplier capacity remains available
signals.summary: Alternate distribution nodes can absorb part of the delayed demand if activated within 24 hours.

scenarios.title: Healthcare Device Outage
scenarios.summary: Covers a high-severity healthcare device disruption combining outage news and operational alerts.

signals.headline: Specialty device manufacturer halts production after systems outage
signals.summary: Production stopped for critical monitoring hardware while recovery work continues.

signals.headline: Hospital deployment team reports replacement inventory at risk
signals.summary: Current stock levels may fall below service targets within 72 hours.
